description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can with a vibrant red exterior, featuring a glossy finish. The front displays bold, white, and yellow text reading 'BLOOD ORANGE SODA' with a dripping, dark red graphic effect, and a background of orange and blue stripes. The back side of the can contains a detailed nutrition facts label in white and red, typical of commercial beverage packaging. The top is metallic silver with a standard pull-tab opening, indicating it is a sealed beverage container. The can's surface appears smooth and reflective, with no visible dents or scratches. The overall design is eye-catching and typical of soft drink cans found in urban environments.
description: A glossy red aluminum can labeled 'BLOOD ORANGE SODA' with bold graphics and a nutrition facts label, featuring a standard pull-tab top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'BLOOD ORANGE SODA' text with dripping red graphics and colorful background.
description_view_1: Back view highlighting the nutrition facts label in white and red, with part of the graphic design visible.
description_view_2: Side view showing the transition between the nutrition label and the graphic design, with orange and blue stripes.
description_view_3: Angled front view focusing on the 'BLOOD ORANGE SODA' text and the colorful background.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white and yellow text reading 'BLOOD ORANGE SODA' with a dripping red effect on the front; detailed white and red nutrition facts label on the back; colorful orange and blue stripes in the background.
